set_values.description: Override specific entity field values. Format: 'filename.entity_id.field' = 'value' (e.g., 'agency.txt.BART.agency_url' = 'https://new-url.com'). Use '*' as entity_id to apply to all entities in a file.

standardized_sort.description: Sort CSV rows before zipping. 'asc' or 'desc'; omit for no sort (default preserves copier order, modulo parent-before-child reordering). Empty cells in numeric/date columns rank as the greatest value (NULLS LAST in asc, NULLS FIRST in desc).

standardized_sort_columns.description: Optional specific columns to sort by. If empty, defaults are used based on file type.

use_basic_route_types.description: Convert extended route types to basic GTFS route types

requestBody.description: Export request with feed version keys and optional transformations

200.description: Successful export - returns GTFS zip file
